message:
fix(agent-drivers): fix memory leak and race condition bugs

- claude-driver.ts: Fix memory leak in delay() helper - abort listener
  was never removed when timeout resolved normally. Now properly cleans
  up the listener on timeout completion.

- base-driver.ts: Fix race condition in subscribe() async generator -
  when terminated event arrived while consumer was processing a previous
  event, queued events were lost. Now drains remaining queue after done
  flag is set to ensure all events are yielded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
